verses.geez:
ወሴምዐ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ነገሮም ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ላባ ፡ ዘይቤሉ ፡ ነሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ወእምንዋየ ፡
                  አቡነ ፡ አጥረዮ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ክብር ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob heard the words of the sons of Laban, saying, Jacob has taken all that was our father's, and of our father's property has he gotten all this glory.
translations.kjv: And he heard the words of Laban’s sons, saying, Jacob hath taken away all that was our father’s; and of that which was our father’s hath he gotten all this glory.

verses.geez: ወርእዮ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ከመ ፡ አኮ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትካት ፡ ገጹ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob saw the countenance of Laban, and behold it was not toward him as before.
translations.kjv: And Jacob beheld the countenance of Laban, and, behold, it was not toward him as before.

verses.geez: ወይሌሎ ፡ አምላክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ግባዕ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ አዝማዲከ ፡ ወእሄሉ ፡ ምስሌከ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Jacob, Return to the land of thy father, and to thy family, and I will be with thee.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Jacob, Return unto the land of thy fathers, and to thy kindred; and I will be with thee.

verses.geez: ወጸውዖን ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለልያ ፡ ወለራሔል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ኀበ ፡ ምርዓይ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob sent and called Lea and Rachel to the plain where the flocks were.
translations.kjv: And Jacob sent and called Rachel and Leah to the field unto his flock,

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎን ፡ ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ እሬኢ ፡ ገጾ ፡ ለአቡክን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትካት ፡ ወአምላኩ ፡ ለአቡየ
                  ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ምስሌየ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, I see the face of your father, that it is not toward me as before, but the God of my father was with me.
translations.kjv: And said unto them, I see your father’s countenance, that it is not toward me as before; but the God of my father hath been with me.

verses.geez: ታአምራ ፡ ከመ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ኀይልየ ፡ ተቀነይኩ ፡ ለአቡክን ።

translations.lxx: And ye too know that with all my might I have served your father.
translations.kjv: And ye know that with all my power I have served your father.

verses.geez: ወአቡክንሰ ፡ አሕዘነኒ ፡ ወወለጠ ፡ ዐስብየ ፡ ዘዐሥሩ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወኢያብሖ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ያሕሥም ፡ ላዕሌየ ።

translations.lxx: But your father deceived me, and changed my wages for the ten lambs, yet God gave him not power to hurt me.
translations.kjv: And your father hath deceived me, and changed my wages ten times; but God suffered him not to hurt me.

verses.geez:
ለእመ ፡ ይቤለኒ ፡ ዘሕብር ፡ ይኩን ፡ ዐስብከ ፡ ወይወልዳ ፡ ኵሎን ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ዘሕብር ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ይቤለኒ ፡ ጻዕዳ
                  ፡ ይኩን ፡ ዐስብከ ፡ ይወልዳ ፡ ኵሎን ፡ ጸዐዳ ።

translations.lxx: If he should say thus, The speckled shall be thy reward, then all the cattle would bear speckled; and if he should say, The white shall be thy reward, then would all the cattle bear white.
translations.kjv: If he said thus, The speckled shall be thy wages; then all the cattle bare speckled: and if he said thus, The ringstraked shall be thy hire; then bare all the cattle ringstraked.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አባግዒሁ ፡ ለአቡክን ፡ ወወሀበኒዮን ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: So God has taken away all the cattle of your father, and given them to me.
translations.kjv: Thus God hath taken away the cattle of your father, and given them to me.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ አመ ፡ ይፀንሳ ፡ እሬኢ ፡ በአዕይንትየ ፡ በሕልም ፡ ወናሁ ፡ አብሓኵ ፡ ዘአባግዕ ፡ ወዘአጣሊ ፡ የዐርጉ ፡
                  ዲበ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ጻዕዳ ፡ ወ[ዘ]ሕብርኒ ፡ ወዘሕብረ ፡ ሐመድ ፡ ወኰሠኰሥ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when the cattle conceived and were with young, that I beheld with mine eyes in sleep, and behold the he-goats and the rams leaping on the sheep and the she-goats, speckled and variegated and spotted with ash-coloured spots.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at the time that the cattle conceived, that I lifted up mine eyes, and saw in a dream, and, behold, the rams which leaped upon the cattle were ringstraked, speckled, and grisled.

verses.geez: ወይቤለኒ ፡ መልአ[ከ] ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በሕልም ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወእቤ ፡ ነየ ፡ አነ ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of God said to me in a dream, Jacob; and I said, What is it?
translations.kjv: And the angel of God spake unto me in a dream, saying, Jacob: And I said, Here am I.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለኒ ፡ ነጽር ፡ በአዕይንቲከ ፡ ወርኢ ፡ አብሓኵ ፡ ዘአጣሊ ፡ ወዘአባግዕ ፡ የዐርጉ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ ወዲበ ፡
                  አባግዕ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ወዘሕብርኒ ፡ ወዘሕብረ ፡ ሐመድ ፡ ወዘኰሠኰሥ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኢኩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይገብር ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ ላባ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Look up with thine eyes, and behold the he-goats and the rams leaping on the sheep and the she-goats, speckled and variegated and spotted with ash-coloured spots; for I have seen all things that Laban does to thee.
translations.kjv: And he said, Lift up now thine eyes, and see, all the rams which leap upon the cattle are ringstraked, speckled, and grisled: for I have seen all that Laban doeth unto thee.

verses.geez:
አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ ዘአስተርአይኩከ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በኀበ ፡ ቀባእከ ፡ ሊተ ፡
                  ሐውልተ ፡ ወበህየ ፡ በፃእከ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ብፅአተ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ ወሑር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ዘተወለድከ ፡ ወእሄሉ ፡
                  ምስሌከ ።

translations.lxx: I am God that appeared to thee in the place of God, where thou anointedst a pillar to me, and vowedst to me there a vow; now then arise and depart out of this land, depart into the land of thy nativity, and I will be with thee.
translations.kjv: I am the God of Bethel, where thou anointedst the pillar, and where thou vowedst a vow unto me: now arise, get thee out from this land, and return unto the land of thy kindred.

verses.geez: ወአውሥኣሁ ፡ ወይቤላሁ ፡ ቦኑ ፡ እንከ ፡ ዘብነ ፡ ርስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡነ ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel and Lea answered and said to him, Have we yet a part or inheritance in the house of our father?
translations.kjv: And Rachel and Leah answered and said unto him, Is there yet any portion or inheritance for us in our father’s house?

verses.geez: አኮኑ ፡ ከመ ፡ ነኪር ፡ ንሕነ ፡ በኀቤሁ ፡ ወሤጠነ ፡ ወበልዐ ፡ ሤጠነ ።

translations.lxx: Are we not considered strangers by him? for he has sold us, and quite devoured our money.
translations.kjv: Are we not counted of him strangers? for he hath sold us, and hath quite devoured also our money.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ ክብር ፡ ዘነሥአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምቤተ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወለውሉድነ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ዘይቤለከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ግበር ።

translations.lxx: All the wealth and the glory which God has taken from our father, it shall be our's and our children's; now then do whatsoever God has said to thee.
translations.kjv: For all the riches which God hath taken from our father, that is ours, and our children’s: now then, whatsoever God hath said unto thee, do.

verses.geez: ወተንሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ አንስቲያሁ ፡ ወደቂቆ ፡ ወጸዐኖሙ ፡ በአግማል ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob arose and took his wives and his children up on the camels;
translations.kjv: Then Jacob rose up, and set his sons and his wives upon camels;

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ወቍስቋሳቲሁኒ ፡ ዘአጥረየ ፡ በማእከለ ፡ አፍላግ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘዚአሁ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቡሁ
                  ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: and he took away all his possessions and all his store, which he had gotten in Mesopotamia, and all that belonged to him, to depart to Isaac his father in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: And he carried away all his cattle, and all his goods which he had gotten, the cattle of his getting, which he had gotten in Padanaram, for to go to Isaac his father in the land of Canaan.

verses.geez: ወላባሰ ፡ ሖረ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይቀርፅ ፡ አባግዒሁ ፡ ወሰረቀት ፡ ራሔል ፡ አማልክተ ፡ አቡሃ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban went to shear his sheep; and Rachel stole her father's images.
translations.kjv: And Laban went to shear his sheep: and Rachel had stolen the images that were her father’s.

verses.geez: ወያዕቆብሰ ፡ ኀብኦ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ ወኢያይድዖ ፡ ከመ ፡ የሐውር ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob hid the matter from Laban the Syrian, so as not to tell him that he ran away.
translations.kjv: And Jacob stole away unawares to Laban the Syrian, in that he told him not that he fled.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘዚአሁ ፡ ወዐደወ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ገለዓድ ።

translations.lxx: And he departed himself and all that belonged to him, and passed over the river, and went into the mountain Galaad.
translations.kjv: So he fled with all that he had; and he rose up, and passed over the river, and set his face toward the mount Gilead.

verses.geez: ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሖረ ፡ ያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: But it was told Laban the Syrian on the third day, that Jacob was fled.
translations.kjv: And it was told Laban on the third day that Jacob was fled.

verses.geez: ወነሥኦሙ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ ወዴገኖሙ ፡ ምሕዋረ ፡ ሰሙን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወረከቦሙ ፡ በደብረ ፡ ገለዓድ ።

translations.lxx: And having taken his brethren with him, he pursued after him seven days' journey, and overtook him on Mount Galaad.
translations.kjv: And he took his brethren with him, and pursued after him seven days’ journey; and they overtook him in the mount Gilead.

verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ላባ ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ በሕልም ፡ ሌሊተ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ዑቅ ፡ ኢትንብብ ፡ ሕሡመ ፡ ላዕለ ፡
                  ያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And God came to Laban the Syrian in sleep by night, and said to him, Take heed to thyself that thou speak not at any time to Jacob evil things.
translations.kjv: And God came to Laban the Syrian in a dream by night, and said unto him, Take heed that thou speak not to Jacob either good or bad.

verses.geez:
ወረከቦ ፡ [ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡] ወያዕቆብሰ ፡ ይተክል ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወአቀሞሙ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ገለዓድ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban overtook Jacob; and Jacob pitched his tent in the mountain; and Laban stationed his brothers in the mount Galaad.
translations.kjv: Then Laban overtook Jacob. Now Jacob had pitched his tent in the mount: and Laban with his brethren pitched in the mount of Gilead.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ገበርኩ ፡ ጽምሚተ ፡ ዘትትኅጥአኒ ፡ ወትሰርቀኒ ፡ አዋልድየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘበኵናት ፡
                  ፄወዉ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to Jacob, What hast thou done? wherefore didst thou run away secretly, and pillage me, and lead away my daughters as captives taken with the sword?
translations.kjv: And Laban said to Jacob, What hast thou done, that thou hast stolen away unawares to me, and carried away my daughters, as captives taken with the sword?

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ነገርከኒ ፡ እምፈነውኩከ ፡ በትፍሥሕት ፡ ወበሐሤት ፡ ወበማሕሌት ፡ ወበከበሮ ፡ ወመሰንቆ ።

translations.lxx: Whereas if thou hadst told me, I would have sent thee away with mirth, and with songs, and timbrels, and harp.
translations.kjv: Wherefore didst thou flee away secretly, and steal away from me; and didst not tell me, that I might have sent thee away with mirth, and with songs, with tabret, and with harp?

verses.geez: ወሚመ ፡ ኢይደልወኒኑ ፡ ከመ ፡ እስዐም ፡ ደቂቅየ ፡ ወአዋልድየ ፡ ወይእዜሰ ፡ ከመ ፡ አብድ ፡ ገበርከ ።

translations.lxx: And I was not counted worthy to embrace my children and my daughters; now then thou hast wrought foolishly.
translations.kjv: And hast not suffered me to kiss my sons and my daughters? thou hast now done foolishly in so doing.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ እምክህልኩ ፡ ገቢረ ፡ እኩየ ፡ ላዕሌከ ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ አምላከ ፡ አቡ[ከ ፡] ይቤለኒ ፡ ትማልም ፡ ዑቅ ፡
                  ርእሰከ ፡ ኢትግበር ፡ ሕሡመ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And now my hand has power to hurt thee; but the God of thy father spoke to me yesterday, saying, Take heed to thyself that thou speak not evil words to Jacob.
translations.kjv: It is in the power of my hand to do you hurt: but the God of your father spake unto me yesternight, saying, Take thou heed that thou speak not to Jacob either good or bad.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ሑር ፡ እስመ ፡ ፌተውከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትሑር ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ወለምንት ፡ ትሰርቀኒ ፡ አማልክትየ ።

translations.lxx: Now then go on thy way, for thou hast earnestly desired to depart to the house of thy father; wherefore hast thou stolen my gods?
translations.kjv: And now, though thou wouldest needs be gone, because thou sore longedst after thy father’s house, yet wherefore hast thou stolen my gods?

verses.geez: ወአውሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ለላባ ፡ እስመ ፡ መስለኒ ፡ ዘተሀይደኒ ፡ አዋልዲከ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ንዋይየ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob answered and said to Laban, Because I was afraid; for I said, Lest at any time thou shouldest take away thy daughters from me, and all my possessions.
translations.kjv: And Jacob answered and said to Laban, Because I was afraid: for I said, Peradventure thou wouldest take by force thy daughters from me.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ርኢ ፡ ለእመቦ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ንዋይከ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ላባ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘረከበ ፡ ወኢምንተ ፡
                  ወይቤ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዘረከብከ ፡ አማልክቲከ ፡ ኢይሕየው ፡ ወናሁ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እሎንቱ ፡ አኀዊነ ፡ ወኢያእመረ ፡
                  ያዕቆብ ፡ ከመ ፡ ራሔል ፡ ሰረቀት ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said, With whomsoever thou shalt find thy gods, he shall not live in the presence of our brethren; take notice of what I have of thy property, and take it; and he observed nothing with him, but Jacob knew not that his wife Rachel had stolen them.
translations.kjv: With whomsoever thou findest thy gods, let him not live: before our brethren discern thou what is thine with me, and take it to thee. For Jacob knew not that Rachel had stolen them.

verses.geez:
ወቦአ ፡ ላባ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ልያ ፡ ወኢረከበ ፡ ወወፅአ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወፈተነ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ክልኤሆን ፡
                  ዕቁባቲሁ ፡ ወኢረከበ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ራሔል ።

translations.lxx: And Laban went in and searched in the house of Lea, and found them not; and he went out of the house of Lea, and searched in the house of Jacob, and in the house of the two maid-servants, and found them not; and he went also into the house of Rachel.
translations.kjv: And Laban went into Jacob’s tent, and into Leah’s tent, and into the two maidservants’ tents; but he found them not. Then went he out of Leah’s tent, and entered into Rachel’s tent.

verses.geez: ወራሔልሰ ፡ ነሥአቶሙ ፡ ለአማልክተ ፡ አቡሃ ፡ ወወደየቶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕንባላተ ፡ ገመል ፡ ወነበረት ፡ ላዕሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Rachel took the idols, and cast them among the camels' packs, and sat upon them.
translations.kjv: Now Rachel had taken the images, and put them in the camel’s furniture, and sat upon them. And Laban searched all the tent, but found them not.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ለአቡሃ ፡ ኢይምሰልከ ፡ ዘአስተሐቀርኩከ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢይክል ፡ ተንሥኦ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ትክት
                  ፡ አነ ፡ ወፈተነ ፡ ላባ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ቤታ ፡ ለራሔል ፡ ወኢረከበ ፡ አማልክቲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And she said to her father, Be not indignant, Sir; I cannot rise up before thee, for it is with me according to the manner of women. Laban searched in all the house, and found not the images.
translations.kjv: And she said to her father, Let it not displease my lord that I cannot rise up before thee; for the custom of women is upon me. And he searched, but found not the images.

verses.geez: ወተምዐ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወተላኰዮ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ምንት ፡ አበሳየ ፡ ወምንት ፡ ጌጋይየ ፡ ዘዴገንከኒ ፤

translations.lxx: And Jacob was angry, and strove with Laban; and Jacob answered and said to Laban, What is my injustice, and what my sin, that thou hast pursued after me,
translations.kjv: And Jacob was wroth, and chode with Laban: and Jacob answered and said to Laban, What is my trespass? what is my sin, that thou hast so hotly pursued after me?

verses.geez:
ወፈተንከኒ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ንዋይየ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ረከብከ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቍስቋሰ ፡ ቤትከ ፡ ናስተኣኅዝኑ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እሎንቱ ፡
                  አኀዊነ ፡ ወይዝልፉ ፡ ማእከሌነ ።

translations.lxx: and that thou hast searched all the furniture of my house? what hast thou found of all the furniture of thine house? set it here between thy relations and my relations, and let them decide between us two.
translations.kjv: Whereas thou hast searched all my stuff, what hast thou found of all thy household stuff? set it here before my brethren and thy brethren, that they may judge betwixt us both.

verses.geez:
ዕሥራ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ሊተ ፡ እንዘ ፡ አዐቅብ ፡ አባግዒከ ፡ ወአጣሌከ ፡ ወኢማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ኢበላዕኩ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  አባግዒከ ።

translations.lxx: These twenty years have I been with thee; thy sheep, and thy she-goats have not failed in bearing; I devoured not the rams of thy cattle.
translations.kjv: This twenty years have I been with thee; thy ewes and thy she goats have not cast their young, and the rams of thy flock have I not eaten.

verses.geez:
ወብላዐ ፡ አርዌኒ ፡ ኢያምጻእኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ አነ ፡ እፈዲ ፡ እምኀቤየ ፡ እመኒቦ ፡ ዘሰርቀ ፡ እመኒ ፡ መዓልተ ፡ ወእመኒ
                  ፡ ሌሊተ ።

translations.lxx: That which was taken of beasts I brought not to thee; I made good of myself the thefts of the day, and the thefts of the night.
translations.kjv: That which was torn of beasts I brought not unto thee; I bare the loss of it; of my hand didst thou require it, whether stolen by day, or stolen by night.

verses.geez: ውስተ ፡ ጠል ፡ እበይት ፡ ወነፍጸ ፡ ንዋም ፡ እምአዕይንትየ ።

translations.lxx: I was parched with heat by day, and chilled with frost by night, and my sleep departed from my eyes.
translations.kjv: Thus I was; in the day the drought consumed me, and the frost by night; and my sleep departed from mine eyes.

verses.geez:
ዕሥራ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዮም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤትከ ፡ ዘተቀነይኩ ፡ ለከ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ወአርባዕተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ተቀነይኩ ፡
                  ለከ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ አዋልዲከ ፡ ወስድስተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አባግዒከ ፡ ወረሰይከ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዐስብየ ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡
                  አባግዐ ።

translations.lxx: These twenty years have I been in thy house; I served thee fourteen years for thy two daughters, and six years among thy sheep, and thou didst falsely rate my wages for ten lambs.
translations.kjv: Thus have I been twenty years in thy house; I served thee fourteen years for thy two daughters, and six years for thy cattle: and thou hast changed my wages ten times.

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ አኮ ፡ አምላከ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አቡየ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ አኮ ፡ በፍርሀተ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ዕራቅየ ፡
                  እምፈነውከኒ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጻማሆን ፡ ለእደውየ ፡ ወገሠጸከ ፡ ትማልም ።

translations.lxx: Unless I had the God of my father Abraam, and the fear of Isaac, now thou wouldest have sent me away empty; God saw my humiliation, and the labour of my hands, and rebuked thee yesterday.
translations.kjv: Except the God of my father, the God of Abraham, and the fear of Isaac, had been with me, surely thou hadst sent me away now empty. God hath seen mine affliction and the labour of my hands, and rebuked thee yesternight.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥአ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ አዋልድኒ ፡ አዋልድየ ፡ ወደቂቅኒ ፡ ደቂቅየ ፡ ወእንስሳሂ ፡ እንስሳየ ፡
                  ወኵሉዝ ፡ ዘትሬኢ ፡ ዘዚአየ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወዘአዋልድየ ፡ ምንተ ፡ እንከ ፡ እሬስዮን ፡ ሎንቱ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወለውሉዶንሂ ፡ ዘወለዶ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Laban answered and said to Jacob, The daughters are my daughters, and the sons my sons, and the cattle are my cattle, and all things which thou seest are mine, and the property of my daughters; what shall I do to them to-day, or their children which they bore?
translations.kjv: And Laban answered and said unto Jacob, These daughters are my daughters, and these children are my children, and these cattle are my cattle, and all that thou seest is mine: and what can I do this day unto these my daughters, or unto their children which they have born?

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ነዓ ፡ ንትማሐል ፡ አነ ፡ ወአንተ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ሰላም ፡ ማእከሌየ ፡ ወማእከሌከ ።

translations.lxx: Now then come, let me make a covenant, both I and thou, and it shall be for a witness between me and thee; and he said to him, Behold, there is no one with us; behold, God is witness between me and thee.
translations.kjv: Now therefore come thou, let us make a covenant, I and thou; and let it be for a witness between me and thee.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ እብነ ፡ ወአቀመ ፡ ሐውልተ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob having taken a stone, set it up for a pillar.
translations.kjv: And Jacob took a stone, and set it up for a pillar.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ አልዱ ፡ እብነ ፡ ወአለዱ ፡ እብነ ፡ [ወገብሩ ፡ ወግረ ፡] ወበልዑ ፡ ወሰትዩ ፡
                  በኀበ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እብነ ፡ ወግር ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ እብን ፡ ስምዕ ፡ ማእከሌየ ፡ ወማእከሌከ ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to his brethren, Gather stones; and they gathered stones and made a heap, and ate there upon the heap; and Laban said to him, This heap witnesses between me and thee to-day.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said unto his brethren, Gather stones; and they took stones, and made an heap: and they did eat there upon the heap.

verses.geez: ወሰመያ ፡ ላባ ፡ ወግረ ፡ ስምዕ ፡ ወያዕቆብኒ ፡ ሰመያ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban called it, the Heap of Testimony; and Jacob called it, the Witness Heap.
translations.kjv: And Laban called it Jegarsahadutha: but Jacob called it Galeed.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ላባ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ሐውልት ፡ እንተ ፡ ኣቀውም ፡ ስምዕ ፡ ማእከሌየ ፡ ወማእከሌከ ፡ ወበእንተ
                  ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ተሰምየ ፡ ስማ ፡ ወግረ ፡ ስምዕ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban said to Jacob, Behold this heap, and the pillar, which I have set between me and thee; this heap witnesses, and this pillar witnesses; therefore its name was called, the Heap witnesses.
translations.kjv: And Laban said, This heap is a witness between me and thee this day. Therefore was the name of it called Galeed;

verses.geez:
ወራእይ ፡ ዘአስተርአየኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይርአይ ፡ ማእከሌየ ፡ ወማእከሌከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ንትራሐቅ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  ካልኡ ፤

translations.lxx: And the vision of which he said—Let God look to it between me and thee, because we are about to depart from each other,—
translations.kjv: And Mizpah; for he said, The LORD watch between me and thee, when we are absent one from another.

verses.geez: ከመ ፡ ኢትሣቅዮን ፡ ለአዋልድየ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ኢትንሣእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ላዕሌሆን ፤

translations.lxx: And Laban said to Jacob, Behold, this heap, and this pillar are a witness.
translations.kjv: If thou shalt afflict my daughters, or if thou shalt take other wives beside my daughters, no man is with us; see, God is witness betwixt me and thee.

verses.geez: ወርኢ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ምስሌነ ።

translations.kjv: And Laban said to Jacob, Behold this heap, and behold this pillar, which I have cast betwixt me and thee:

verses.geez:
እመኒ ፡ (ኢ)ዐደውኩ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ወግር ፡ ወዛቲ ፡ ሐውልት ፡ ትትልወኒ ፡ በእኪት ፡ ወአንተኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡
                  (ኢ)ዐደውከ ፡ ኀቤየ ።

translations.lxx: For if I should not cross over unto thee, neither shouldest thou cross over to me, for mischief beyond this heap and this pillar.
translations.kjv: This heap be witness, and this pillar be witness, that I will not pass over this heap to thee, and that thou shalt not pass over this heap and this pillar unto me, for harm.

verses.geez:
አምላከ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወአምላከ ፡ ናኮር ፡ ይፍታሕ ፡ ማእከሌነ ፡ ወመሐለ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ በፍርሀተ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡
                  አቡሁ ።

translations.lxx: The God of Abraam and the God of Nachor judge between us; and Jacob swore by the Fear of his father Isaac.
translations.kjv: The God of Abraham, and the God of Nahor, the God of their father, judge betwixt us. And Jacob sware by the fear of his father Isaac.

verses.geez:
ወሦዐ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወጸውዐ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ ወበልዑ ፡ ወሰትዩ ፡ ወቤቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And he offered a sacrifice in the mountain, and called his brethren, and they ate and drank, and slept in the mountain.
translations.kjv: Then Jacob offered sacrifice upon the mount, and called his brethren to eat bread: and they did eat bread, and tarried all night in the mount.
